title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is a generative UI application demonstrated at Google Cloud Next '26 that combines Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to generate personalized latte art. The app uses agentic features and Agent-to-UI (A2UI) to dynamically create custom images on demand based on individual customer preferences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a generative UI application shown at Google Cloud Next '26 that combines Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini to produce personalized latte art. It demonstrates how agentic features and Agent-to-UI (A2UI) work together to generate custom images on demand based on individual customer preferences. The takeaway is a concrete reference for stitching Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini into a single application where agents drive dynamic, per-user UI and image generation.
